---
title: "WARC"
page-layout: article
---

# WARC

## Description

Advertising and marketing intelligence platform with case studies, best practices, brand insights, and industry analysis. Supports marketing strategy, media, and consumer research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?url=https://www.warc.com)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
